title: Create Factory Logistics
description: Ever wondered why there are logistics packages, but no logistics jars? Let's fix this!
body:
### tldr

An addon for the Create 6 mod featuring a unique way of fluid transportation in your logistics network - the **Jar**. It works like packages for items but for liquids, so it can be neatly integrated into your frog-chain logistical system.


![jar_showcase_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac325294b6908648d622524d79d83d3d90edd658_0.webp)



### Included content

- The Jar
![jars_showcase_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da290386d96190b2836b1070c5d73314ed519a31_0.webp)
 
- Bottler (same as regular packager, but for fluids!)
![jar_packager_showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f97c7f82ee68a1b87e5860be871147489757f63_0.webp)

- Fluid gauge: extend your auto-crafting workflows via fluid ingredients or outputs
![fluid_gauge_showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab9be6bb2981a35ee0e92c942b23c2f38afbc07_0.webp)
  
- _more is planned!_

## Early Access Warning!

Right now we're in early access stage so make sure to report any misbehaves or missing features to our GitHub issues.
Also, we are open to the new suggestions and ideas, so tell us if you have any.
